title: ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS
label: organizations/firetalk-records
body:
# ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS

**Project:** [[projects/alphabets]]  
**Bandcamp release:** 2013-11-07  
**Original release:** Autumn 2012 (Firetalk Records)  
**Bandcamp:** https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/on-champagne-and-greyhounds-2  
**Tracks:** 7  

> ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS by alphabets, released 07 November 2013
> 
> 1. GEL STRIPPER
> 2. SCENE GIRL HAIR SPRAYER
> 3. AIRPORT STORE GIFTS
> 4. LANDSCAPER
> 5. GECKO RING
> 6. SASHIMI IN THA TERMINAL
> 7. STILL BORN, SHUT UP
> 
> ON CHAMPAGNE AND GREYHOUNDS.
> RELEASED ON FIRETALK RECS AUTUMN 2012
> 
> write up on FA

**Label note:** The Bandcamp description confirms this album was originally released on **Firetalk Records** in Autumn 2012 — the Bandcamp edition (uploaded November 7, 2013) appears to be a later digital upload. The Bandcamp slug `on-champagne-and-greyhounds-2` suggests either a Vol 2 designation or a second version. A "Vol 1" has not yet been located in the archive or on Bandcamp; research ongoing.

**"write up on FA"**: "FA" likely refers to *The Fader* or *Free Association* — a published review or feature of this album may exist but has not yet been located.
